payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. No memories were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Unauthorized admin SQL command was not executed.
No durable memory was created from this command.
No memory_cards were deleted or changed.

repair_options: If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported user-level memory commands.
Contact an administrator for authorized administrative operations.
